prompt:
Use the face and exact appearance of the person in the uploaded image as reference. Create a premium cozy coffee brand advertisement for "EMBER".

Person wearing: Warm camel brown oversized knit sweater and cream pants.

Pose: Holding a giant oversized ceramic coffee cup prop, relaxed cozy sitting pose.

Background: Warm terracotta and cream background, large bold rustic serif typography "EMBER" filling background.

Product: Coffee packaging shown bottom right corner.

Tagline bottom center: "Every sip tells a story."

Top right watermark: "GPT image 2"

Floor: Warm wood-tone reflective floor, steam rising from cup visible.

Lighting: Warm soft morning editorial lighting.

Quality: Ultra HD 8K photorealistic, portrait 3:4 ratio.
